title: SurgeDB
description: SIMD-powered vector database in pure Rust for the edge. Indexes 100k vectors in 39MB RAM with Adaptive HNSW, SQ8/Binary quantization, and ACID-compliant persistence.

title: Koraku
description: Self-hostable ReAct agent runtime with isolated 3-tier sandbox routing. Open-source AI assistant for context-aware knowledge management and multi-step agent execution.

title: Chipling
description: Multimodal vector discovery engine using CLIP models for concept-based search. Semantic visual search platform scaling to 500+ active users.

title: MeuxCompanion
description: Self-hosted AI companion with Live2D/VRM characters, voice chat, lip-synced speech, and per-sentence emotional reactions. Built with Rust + Tauri for native performance.

title: Bakwas v1 Alpha
description: Extractive prompt compression model fine-tuned on DistilBERT (66M params). Binary token classifier that strips redundant LLM prompt tokens — reducing context cost and KV-cache latency without generative rewriting. Published on Hugging Face with interactive demo.

title: Unio
description: Unified OpenAI-compatible gateway for multiple LLM providers. Supports key rotation, automatic fallback, and centralized model management across 10+ providers.

title: Axiom
description: Open-source AI search engine inspired by Perplexity. Real-time web search, summarization, and multi-agent question-answering with cited sources.

title: Schemely
description: Converts natural language and URLs into structured JSON via LLM-powered schema extraction — automating data parsing pipelines for developers.

title: FastHost
description: Self-hosted Python backend deployment platform. One-click deploy for FastAPI and Flask apps with Docker-based container orchestration.

title: Dokusha
description: Manga and webtoon reader built with React Native, inspired by Tachiyomi. Clean UI with library management and offline reading support.

title: MeuxVtuber
description: Lightweight AI VTuber with no API key requirements. Real-time streaming integration with AI character dialogue and expression control.
